narrative:
Cols 73-I (precinct in Franklin County) has 986 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.4 percentage points.
